General.Name: Water Oasis Group Ltd
General.Description: Water Oasis Group Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates beauty service centers in Hong Kong, Macau, and the People's Republic of China. It operates through Product and Service segments. The company offers general, specialist, and medical beauty services to high-end, mid-range, and mass-market consumer sectors for men and women through its spas, beauty salons, and medical beauty centers under the Oasis Beauty, Oasis Spa, Oasis Medical, Oasis Homme, Oasis Hair Spa, Oasis Dental Care, Oasis Health, Oasis Nail, Oasis Florist, Oasis Mom, phMedic+, InMedic, and Glycel Skin Spa brands. It also distributes skincare products under the Glycel, Eurobeauté, Erno Laszlo, DermaSynergy, HABA, and O~KO! beauty brands. In addition, the company operates online florist shops; and holds trademarks. Further, it is involved in the online sale of skincare products; provision of dental, medical, and aesthetic services; and holding of property, as well as produces and sells healing tea. Water Oasis Group Limited was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong.
General.Address: World Trade Center, Causeway Bay, Hong Kong
